commands.title: /list
commands.description: Lists all players currently connected to the server.

commands.title: /kick
commands.description: Removes a player from the server session.
commands.breakdown: reason is optional and visible to the player who gets kicked.

commands.title: /op
commands.description: Grants Operator status to a player.
commands.breakdown: Operators can run almost any command.

commands.title: /deop
commands.description: Removes Operator status from a player.

commands.title: /spawnpoint
commands.description: Sets a player’s individual spawn point.
commands.breakdown: Overrides the world spawn for that specific player.

commands.title: /save-all
commands.description: Forces the server to save all pending changes to disk.

commands.title: /setmaxplayers
commands.description: Sets the maximum number of players allowed in the game.
